cover_variation_022_prob65_t0.5_5E490D.j.prompt_text:
----------------------------------------
A high-fidelity studio capture of a tangible, neo-Dadaist sculptural piece. At the core of the image lies a dense, flawlessly mirrored chrome human head, starkly illuminated against a blindingly seamless white drop. A visible structural fissure runs across the polished face. The crown of the head is perfectly sliced and tilted back on a concealed pivot, radiating an intense, molten-gold luminescence from the void within. Erupting violently from the golden warmth of the metallic mind is a chaotic assemblage of items: A white pigeon, An anatomical human heart model cast in clear acrylic, A stained ceramic teacup, A shattered bottle leaking bright purple ink, a jagged bismuth crystals, A desiccated lizard skin, A Möbius strip forged from oxidized copper. A striking, glossy red acrylic 'X' is thickly layered over the left eye, creating a visceral, avant-garde focal point on the silver face. Surgical, pinpoint illumination must ricochet off the polished alloy, casting aggressive, blade-like reflections that emphasize the sculpture's cold, heavy mass. An avant-garde design that is both deep and entertaining. The design is sharp and well put together.

----------------------------------------

The centerpiece is a heavy, mirror-polished steel-chrome human bust, exuding an imposing physical presence against a stark, infinite white cyclorama.   The crown of the head is perfectly sliced and tilted back on a concealed pivot, radiating an intense, molten-gold luminescence from the void within. Protruding sharply from the hinged metallic crown is an eclectic, gravity-defying sculpture composed of: A crumpled manuscript page covered in mathematical symbols, A vintage mechanical calculator jammed with a steel nail, A bubbling vial of thick silver liquid, A Möbius strip forged from oxidized copper, A shattered bottle leaking bright purple ink, A burnt piece of timber, A shriveled brown apple, A luminescent blue test tube, A rare exotic beetle. A bold, textural red 'X' in heavy impasto paint crosses out the left eye, an avant-garde defacement of the mirrored surface. Cinematic, hard-edged lighting must sculpt the metallic face, throwing razor-thin specular highlights that clash dramatically against deep, impenetrable darks. An avant-garde design that is both deep and entertaining. It has a strong, clean layout.
